description: This file contains utility functions for filtering tabular data based on multiple criteria, including search terms, entity filters (like team, user, feature, department, geography), and sorting options.

methods.name: textIncludes(haystack, needle)
methods.description: Checks if the 'haystack' contains the 'needle', case-insensitive, with handling for null/undefined or empty 'needle'.

methods.name: applyFilters({ rows, filters, searchableKeys = [], sortNumericFallbackKey = "" })
methods.description: Applies search, filter, and sorting operations to an array of objects ('rows') based on provided filter criteria and options.

ctags.name: applyFilters
ctags.pattern: /^export function applyFilters({ rows, filters, searchableKeys = [], sortNumericFallbackKey = "" }/
